decision_policy.purpose: Φ N-path generalization (4 → 8 substrate) for stronger substrate-invariance certification (C(8,2)=28 pair vs C(4,2)=6 pair).
decision_policy.license_preference: Apache-2.0 preferred for added 4 paths to widen public-distribution surface; Llama community retained for p2 only (existing).
decision_policy.capacity_normalization: extend 8B/14B/31B ladder with 7B/14B/9B/4B variants; rank scales with d_model per d_model-proportional rule (8B=64, 12B=96, 31B=128).
decision_policy.diversity_axes: vendor (mistral / deepseek / microsoft / 01-ai) × architecture (dense / dense-MLA / sliding-window / dense) × tokenizer (BPE / proprietary).

added_paths.independence_axis: Mistral 직계 7B classic · sliding window · BPE 32K
added_paths.rationale: p3 ministral-3 와 동일 vendor 다른 세대 — within-family substrate variance 측정 가능.

added_paths.license_note: DeepSeek License is permissive but NOT Apache-2.0 — review before public artifact release.
added_paths.architecture: dense decoder-only · MLA (Multi-head Latent Attention) · proprietary tokenizer
added_paths.independence_axis: MLA attention · 中문 corpus heavy · 14B class
added_paths.rationale: MLA architecture diversity — 기존 4 path 모두 standard GQA. 약점: license 비-Apache, public dist 제약.
added_paths.fallback_if_unavailable: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V2-Lite (15.7B activated 2.4B MoE — substrate axis 변경되나 spec 보유)

added_paths.independence_axis: Microsoft synthetic-data heavy curriculum · 3.8B small-class · MIT license

lora.target_modules_note: Phi-3 fused qkv_proj + gate_up_proj — different module names from Llama-style.

added_paths.rationale: small-class anchor (3.8B) — substrate-invariance가 large/small 모두 성립하는지 측정. MIT license = max public dist.
Yi family는 4-path 에 부재한 새로운 vendor — 48 layers (vs Qwen 36, Llama 32) depth axis 추가.

tokenizer_drift_handling.policy: path 별 corpus 전처리 분기 (4-path policy 그대로 확장)

license_handling.public_release_note: p6 (DeepSeek) 외 7 path 는 공개 dist 가능; p6 는 license 검토 후 결정.

vram_budget_h100x4_8path.approach_a_serial: 4 path simultaneous + 4 path next round (2 round × 4 path) — 동일 H100 × 4 활용
vram_budget_h100x4_8path.approach_b_pod_double: 8 H100 동시 (pod 8 ×) — 비용 2× 그러나 wall-time half. K59 autoscale 이 결정.
vram_budget_h100x4_8path.recommended: approach_a (cost-conservative) — K59 queue depth 기반 dynamic 가능

activation_checklist: [ ] 4 added paths capacity_estimate exact 계산 (lora_rank_per_path 확장)
[ ] p6 DeepSeek license review or fallback to V2-Lite
[ ] H100 pod count decision (4 → 8 or 4 round-2)
[ ] tokenizer 4 추가에 대해 anima r13 corpus path 별 retokenize

audit_notes.fake_pass_guard: All capacity numbers from public arch dims; no training executed. Spec-only file, no .roadmap modification.
audit_notes.uchg_note: Not uchg-locked; may revise added_paths before activation.
